title: Require Service Spine Topology
forbids: a missing root or module anchor, a second service spine, or a module-owned context, implementer, host, or procedures container
why: Standalone services and API-embedded service interiors share one stable oRPC spine. Closing only its semantic anchors makes alternate authority visible without requiring models, middleware, persistence, or tests that a service does not need.
remediate: Keep base.ts, contract.ts, impl.ts, modules, and router.ts at the service root. Keep contract.ts, module.ts, and router.ts in every module. Add optional model, middleware, persistence, errors, tests, or Nx metadata only where the owning semantics require them.
message: Every service interior must retain one generic root spine and generic module shells.
